params.name: Lives Magazine Vol.1
params.description:
On May 13, 1936 AD, Luce founded Life Magazine in New York.
After the success of Time Magazine, media mogul Luce began to expand his business and founded Life Magazine during this period. The content of the magazine mainly featured news photography such as feature stories and special photos, which had a pioneering significance in the field of news photography and left an unforgettable impression on future generations.
